sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73976" key="o(mwrofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμωροφ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n73976.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be under the same roof,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-οροφ-</foreign>cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
